scripts.dev: concurrently -n gateway,product,user,order,inventory,payment -c cyan,green,yellow,blue,magenta,red,white "npm run dev:gateway" "npm run dev:product" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:order" "npm run dev:inventory" "npm run dev:payment"
scripts.start: concurrently -n gateway,product,user,order,inventory,payment "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:product" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:order" "npm run start:inventory" "npm run start:payment"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace services/api-gateway && npm install --workspace services/product-service && npm install --workspace services/user-service && npm install --workspace services/order-service && npm install --workspace services/inventory-service && npm install --workspace services/payment-service
